name: video-template-seedance-2-0-80-year-old-rapper-mv
title: Seedance 2.0: 80-Year-Old Rapper MV

title_i18n.fr: Seedance 2.0 : MV de rappeuse de 80 ans
title_i18n.es: Seedance 2.0: MV de rapera de 80 años
title_i18n.pt-BR: Seedance 2.0: MV de rapper de 80 anos
title_i18n.ar: Seedance 2.0: فيديو كليب لمغنية راب عمرها 80 عاماً

description: A detailed, 15-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 16:9 horizontal street rap music video (MV) featuring an 80-year-old woman. The prompt specifies the style (neon purple/blue cool tones, exp

description_i18n.zh-CN: 为Seedance 2.0生成详细的15秒提示词，用于制作16:9横版街头说唱MV，主角是一位80岁的女性，采用霓虹紫蓝冷色调风格。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 為Seedance 2.0生成詳細的15秒提示詞，用於製作16:9橫版街頭饒舌MV，主角是一位80歲的女性，採用霓虹紫藍冷色調風格。
description_i18n.ja: Seedance 2.0で16:9横型ストリートラップMVを生成するための15秒の詳細プロンプト。80歳の女性が主役で、ネオンパープル/ブルーのクールトーンスタイルを指定。
description_i18n.ko: Seedance 2.0로 16:9 가로형 스트리트 랩 뮤직비디오를 생성하기 위한 15초 상세 프롬프트. 80세 여성이 주인공이며 네온 퍼플/블루 쿨톤 스타일로 지정됨.
description_i18n.de: Ein detaillierter 15-Sekunden-Prompt für Seedance 2.0 zur Erstellung eines 16:9-Querformat-Street-Rap-Musikvideos mit einer 80-jährigen Frau in Neon-Lila/Blau-Kühltönen.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt détaillé de 15 secondes pour Seedance 2.0 permettant de générer un clip de rap de rue en format 16:9 horizontal avec une femme de 80 ans, dans un style néon violet/bleu aux tons froids.
description_i18n.ru: Детальный 15-секундный промпт для Seedance 2.0 для создания уличного рэп-клипа в формате 16:9 с участием 80-летней женщины в стиле неоновых фиолетово-синих холодных тонов.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt detallado de 15 segundos para Seedance 2.0 que genera un vídeo musical de rap callejero en formato horizontal 16:9 protagonizado por una mujer de 80 años, con estilo de tonos fríos neón púrpura/azul.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt detalhado de 15 segundos para o Seedance 2.0 gerar um videoclipe de rap de rua em formato horizontal 16:9 estrelando uma mulher de 80 anos, com estilo de tons frios neon roxo/azul.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt dettagliato di 15 secondi per Seedance 2.0 per generare un video musicale rap di strada in formato orizzontale 16:9 con protagonista una donna di 80 anni, in stile toni freddi neon viola/blu.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt chi tiết 15 giây cho Seedance 2.0 để tạo video nhạc rap đường phố tỷ lệ 16:9 ngang với nhân vật chính là phụ nữ 80 tuổi, phong cách tông màu lạnh neon tím/xanh.
description_i18n.pl: Szczegółowy 15-sekundowy prompt dla Seedance 2.0 do generowania teledysku street rapowego w formacie poziomym 16:9 z udziałem 80-letniej kobiety, w stylu neonowych fioletowo-niebieskich chłodnych tonów.
description_i18n.id: Prompt detail 15 detik untuk Seedance 2.0 menghasilkan video musik rap jalanan format horizontal 16:9 yang menampilkan wanita berusia 80 tahun, dengan gaya nada dingin neon ungu/biru.
description_i18n.nl: Een gedetailleerde 15-seconden prompt voor Seedance 2.0 om een 16:9 horizontale street rap-muziekvideo te genereren met een 80-jarige vrouw, in neon paars/blauwe koele tonen stijl.
description_i18n.ar: موجه تفصيلي مدته 15 ثانية لـ Seedance 2.0 لإنشاء فيديو موسيقى راب الشارع بنسبة 16:9 أفقي يضم امرأة تبلغ من العمر 80 عاماً، بأسلوب نيون أرجواني/أزرق بدرجات باردة.
description_i18n.tr: Seedance 2.0 için 80 yaşında bir kadının başrol oynadığı 16:9 yatay sokak rap müzik videosu oluşturmak üzere neon mor/mavi soğuk tonlar stiliyle 15 saniyelik detaylı prompt.
description_i18n.uk: Детальний 15-секундний промпт для Seedance 2.0 для створення відеокліпу вуличного репу у форматі 16:9 за участю 80-річної жінки в стилі неонових фіолетово-синіх холодних тонів.
description_i18n.en: A detailed, 15-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 16:9 horizontal street rap music video (MV) featuring an 80-year-old woman. The prompt specifies the style (neon purple/blue cool tones, exp

query.en: 16:9 horizontal screen, street rap MV style, neon purple and blue cool tones, explosive cool and fierce atmosphere. 0-3 seconds: Medium shot push-in, city street night scene with flashing neon lights, an 80-year-old silver-haired woman stands in front of a graffiti wall, short silver-white hair styled in a neat slick-back, distinct square face contour, sword-like eyebrows slanting towards the temples, eyes sharp like electricity, wrinkles at the corners of her eyes like badges of time, a confident smile on the corner of her mouth, wearing a black leather jacket over a white printed T-shirt (large black letters "YOLO" on the chest) + black cargo pants + white high-top sneakers, a thick gold chain necklace around her neck, silver bracelet on her wrist, holding up a microphone with both hands, strong drum beats of the BGM start, the old woman's eyes sharpen, and her lips open to start Rap. 3-7 seconds: Medium shot + close-up switch, the old woman starts rapping, with an extremely strong sense of rhythm, her silver hair flying with her head-nodding movements, one hand holding the microphone, the other hand making gestures to match the rhythm—index finger pointing at the camera, palm cutting the rhythm up and down, making hip-hop gestures, movements are smooth and flowing, eyes sharp and looking directly at the camera, wrinkles vividly jumping with her expression, lips opening and closing rapidly to spit out lyrics: [Rap Lyrics] "Eighty-year-old legs, can jump better than you! Silver hair flowing, this is my pride! Don't call me old, my Flow is better than yours, when you were playing rap, I was listening to disco!" (Fast speed, strong rhythm, fierce attitude) Quick cuts: facial close-ups, hand movements, full-body swaying, side silhouettes, synchronized with the BGM beat. 7-11 seconds: Dance segment, the camera pulls back to show the full body, the old woman starts dancing—first the classic hip-hop bounce, then a neat street dance freeze, followed by a body wave transmitting from the shoulders to the toes, and then a quick footwork workout, movements are clean and sharp, silver hair flies under the neon lights, the leather jacket flutters in the air, she continues to Rap while dancing: [Rap Lyrics] "Legs and feet are nimble, speed is not slow, my lyrics are carved in time! You play with phones, I play with beats, eighty years of life, written into this verse!" (Faster rhythm, stronger tone) Low-angle upward shot + 360-degree surrounding shot, capturing the old woman's cool and fierce dance moves. 11-15 seconds: Climax ending, the old woman makes a cool turn, her silver hair arcs in the air, she faces the camera and makes a "shush" gesture with her finger, then her lips move closer to the microphone, singing the last line in a low, magnetic voice: [Reality Lyrics] "Time never defeats a beauty, I just changed the way I experience youth..." (Slow rhythm, deep emotion, lingering finish) The camera slowly pushes in for a close-up of the old woman's eyes, the wrinkles at the corners of her eyes are all stories, her gaze is still sharp yet with a hint of kindness, the BGM abruptly stops at the climax, the frame freezes on the old woman's cool yet slightly gentle smile, vignetting + neon purple light halo.

Silver hair flowing, this is my pride! Don't call me old, my Flow is better than yours, when you were playing rap, I was listening to disco!" You play with phones, I play with beats, eighty years of life, written into this verse!" (Faster rhythm, stronger tone) Low-angle upward shot + 360-degree surrounding shot, capturing the old woman's cool and fierce dance moves. 11-15 seconds: Climax ending, the old woman makes a cool turn, her silver hair arcs in the air, she faces the camera and makes a "shush" gesture with her finger, then her lips move closer to the microphone, singing the last line in a low, magnetic voice: [Reality Lyrics] "Time never defeats a beauty, I just changed the way I experience youth..."
